## [00:00 - 02:56]

So many people think that they are stuck with the way they sound and they believe they're stuck with the way they communicate and they don't realise that the way you speak and communicate they are just a series of behaviours and guess what? You can change your behaviours which ultimately means that you can change the way you sound and you can change and transform the way you communicate and by changing just a few behaviours can literally be the difference between getting a job or missing out First phrase What? Starting a new wonderful friendship or just remaining acquaintances I thought I was your best friend Becoming somebody's lover or remaining strangers Why don't you love me, Jenny? I want to prove this to you Just watch a few of my students here change a few things about their communication and see for yourself the difference changing just a few things can make when it comes to communication I was walking into a meeting a one-on-one with Pat, a new member of our team What was the most amazing part about that was the freedom that I felt when I told them And I'm really excited about that getting clarity around what my message is Thank you in advance for your feedback I see the bigger version of me So then thank you so much Wasn't that interesting? Just by my students changing a few key behaviours it completely changed how you perceived them, right? If you made these small changes yourself other people would react to you in the same way that you reacted to my students when you watched the videos If you're not achieving the success that you desire and you believe it's due to your communication skills if you do nothing nothing changes Newton's first law of motion states that an object that is not moving will not start moving on its own it will remain stationary unless a force acts upon it If you don't want to be stationary anymore if you want to start moving then take action and transform your communication skills and I'm here to help you Every year I run a few free master classes Join me for my last free master class for 2023 If you want to sign up for this master class please check out the link in the comments I've got two time zones to try to accommodate as many of you as possible When you click that link you'll see two different time zones that are converted into your local time zone to keep things simple Just pick the one that works best for you If you decide to join me live I'm going to give you my self-awareness assessment for free and this is a five-step process that allows you to identify the non-functional behaviors that you're currently exhibiting in your communication Once you become more aware of these non-functional behaviors it's going to help you become more influential and more impactful every time you open your mouth and you communicate I can't wait to see you at the master class This is the final one that I'll be running See you there
